name: lucasbrandao-cc-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Lucas Brandão.

plugins.name: pptx-workflow
plugins.description: Generate high-quality .pptx presentations from user-provided templates via a multi-agent workflow that preserves branding and composes decks deterministically.

plugins.name: meeting-catalog
plugins.description: Turn meeting transcripts into a validated, drift-free catalog: multi-format intake, LLM analysis gated by a deterministic Pydantic validator, and a regenerated index queried via the mtgctl CLI.

plugins.name: agentic-dev
plugins.description: Agentic development workflows with GitHub integration — turn 'fix this' / 'ship that' into a well-formed issue, a verified change, and a review-ready PR through a gated issue/branch/PR flow.
